prompt: Show total revenue by product brand for 2023 as a bar chart
answer: In 2023, the total revenue by product brand is as follows: GoldenCrust generated $1,237,536.46, CreamyFarm $1,116,963.60, CleanHome $985,063.32, CoolSip $942,234.79, GlowUp $682,053.43, and CrunchTime $452,267.33. This data illustrates the revenue performance of each brand for the year.

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

x_col = config['x_axis']
y_col = config['y_axis']

if 'y_axes' in config:
    y_axes = config['y_axes']
    n_series = len(y_axes)
    bar_width = 0.8 / n_series
    x_labels = data_df[x_col].astype(str)
    x = np.arange(len(x_labels))

    plt.figure(figsize=(12, 6))
    for i, col in enumerate(y_axes):
        offset = (i - n_series / 2 + 0.5) * bar_width
        plt.bar(x + offset, data_df[col], width=bar_width, label=col)

    plt.xlabel(x_col)
    plt.ylabel('Value')
    plt.title(config['title'])
    plt.xticks(x, x_labels, rotation=45, ha='right')
    plt.legend()
    plt.grid(True, axis='y', alpha=0.3)

elif 'group_by' in config:
    group_col = config['group_by']
    groups = sorted(data_df[group_col].unique())
    x_labels = sorted(data_df[x_col].unique())
    x = np.arange(len(x_labels))
    n_series = len(groups)
    bar_width = 0.8 / n_series

    plt.figure(figsize=(12, 6))
    for i, group_val in enumerate(groups):
        df_group = data_df[data_df[group_col] == group_val].set_index(x_col)
        y_vals = [df_group.loc[xl, y_col] if xl in df_group.index else 0 for xl in x_labels]
        offset = (i - n_series / 2 + 0.5) * bar_width
        plt.bar(x + offset, y_vals, width=bar_width, label=str(group_val))

    plt.xlabel(x_col)
    plt.ylabel(y_col)
    plt.title(config['title'])
    plt.xticks(x, x_labels, rotation=45, ha='right')
    plt.legend()
    plt.grid(True, axis='y', alpha=0.3)

else:
    x_data = data_df[x_col]
    y_data = data_df[y_col]

    plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))
    plt.bar(x_data, y_data)
    plt.xlabel(x_col)
    plt.ylabel(y_col)
    plt.title(config['title'])
    plt.xticks(rotation=45, ha='right')

plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
visualization_goal: Bar chart showing total revenue per brand for 2023, ordered from highest to lowest
sql_query:
SELECT p.brand, SUM(s.Total_Sale_Value) AS Total_Revenue 
FROM sales s 
JOIN products p ON s.SKU_Coded = p.SKU_Coded 
WHERE CAST(s.Sold_Date AS VARCHAR) LIKE '2023%' 
GROUP BY p.brand 
ORDER BY Total_Revenue DESC;
